indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space may lead to distractions and lack of privacy.

indicators.name: No dedicated desk
indicators.rationale: A dedicated desk would provide a stable surface for a computer and other work tools.

indicators.name: Bright natural light
indicators.rationale: Natural light can improve mood and focus during work.

reasoning_summary: The space is spacious but lacks a dedicated workspace, which could be distracting and hinder productivity.
